option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# User and Role Management Implementation Summary
## Overview Implemented comprehensive user and role management endpoints for PicoNet, following the same architecture pattern as the existing AuthController. All endpoints are protected with the `RequireAdmin` authorization policy.
## Files Created
### Request DTOs (PicoNet.Contracts/DTOs/Requests/)
**Users folder:** - `CreateUserRequest.cs` — Create user with roles - `UpdateUserRequest.cs` — Update username, email, or active status - `ForcePasswordChangeRequest.cs` — Force password change endpoint input - `ManualVerifyUserRequest.cs` — Manually verify user email/phone - `ManageRoleRequest.cs` — Add/remove role requests
**Roles folder:** - `CreateRoleRequest.cs` — Create role with description
### Response DTOs (PicoNet.Contracts/DTOs/Responses/)
**Users folder:** - `UserResponse.cs` — User details with roles - `ListUsersResponse.cs` — Paginated user list - `UserRolesResponse.cs` — User and assigned roles
**Roles folder:** - `RoleResponse.cs` — Role info with user count
### Commands (PicoNet.Application/Features/)
**Users/Commands:** - `ListUsersCommand.cs` — List users with pagination - `GetUserCommand.cs` — Get user by ID - `CreateUserCommand.cs` — Create new user - `UpdateUserCommand.cs` — Update user details - `DeleteUserCommand.cs` — Delete user - `ManualVerifyUserCommand.cs` — Manually verify user - `ForcePasswordChangeCommand.cs` — Force password change - `AddRoleCommand.cs` — Add role to user - `RemoveRoleCommand.cs` — Remove role from user
**Roles/Commands:** - `ListRolesCommand.cs` — List all roles - `CreateRoleCommand.cs` — Create new role - `DeleteRoleCommand.cs` — Delete role
### Handlers (PicoNet.Application/Features/)
**Users/Handler:** - `ListUsersHandler.cs` — Handles user listing with pagination - `GetUserHandler.cs` — Retrieve single user - `CreateUserHandler.cs` — Create user with default "User" role or specified roles - `UpdateUserHandler.cs` — Update user info and status - `DeleteUserHandler.cs` — Delete user permanently - `ManualVerifyUserHandler.cs` — Mark user email/phone as confirmed - `ForcePasswordChangeHandler.cs` — Admin-initiated password change - `AddRoleHandler.cs` — Assign role to user - `RemoveRoleHandler.cs` — Remove role from user
**Roles/Handler:** - `ListRolesHandler.cs` — List roles with user counts - `CreateRoleHandler.cs` — Create new role - `DeleteRoleHandler.cs` — Delete role (prevents deletion of built-in roles)
### Controllers (PicoNet.Api/Controllers/)
- `UsersController.cs` — 9 endpoints for user management (CRUD, verify, password, roles) - `RolesController.cs` — 3 endpoints for role management (list, create, delete)
### Documentation
- `docs/user-and-role-management.md` — Comprehensive API reference with examples - Updated `docs/README.md` to reference new documentation
## Endpoints Summary
### Users Controller (`/api/users`) — All require RequireAdmin policy
1. **GET /api/users** — List all users (paginated) 2. **GET /api/users/{userId}** — Get user by ID 3. **POST /api/users** — Create new user 4. **PATCH /api/users/{userId}** — Update user 5. **DELETE /api/users/{userId}** — Delete user 6. **POST /api/users/{userId}/verify** — Manually verify user (email/phone) 7. **POST /api/users/{userId}/force-password-change** — Force password reset 8. **POST /api/users/{userId}/roles** — Add role to user 9. **DELETE /api/users/{userId}/roles/{roleName}** — Remove role from user
### Roles Controller (`/api/roles`) — All require RequireAdmin policy
1. **GET /api/roles** — List all roles with user counts 2. **POST /api/roles** — Create new role 3. **DELETE /api/roles/{roleName}** — Delete role
## Key Features
✅ **Complete CRUD operations** for users and roles ✅ **Role management** — Add/remove roles from users, create/delete custom roles ✅ **User verification** — Manual email/phone confirmation by admin ✅ **Password management** — Force password changes for users ✅ **Pagination** — Support for listing users with page/size parameters ✅ **Authorization** — All endpoints protected with RequireAdmin policy ✅ **Error handling** — Proper ErrorOr pattern and problem details responses ✅ **Comprehensive DTOs** — Separate request/response types for each operation ✅ **Wolverine integration** — Uses message bus for command dispatch ✅ **Built-in role protection** — Cannot delete User or Admin roles
## Design Patterns Used
1. **Command/Handler Pattern** — Via Wolverine IMessageBus 2. **ErrorOr<T> Pattern** — For error handling 3. **DTO Pattern** — Separate request/response contracts 4. **Controller Pattern** — RESTful API design 5. **Authorization Policy** — RequireAdmin policy for protected endpoints
## Testing Recommendations
- Test user creation with and without roles - Test role assignment and removal - Test pagination with various page sizes - Test error cases (duplicate email/username, non-existent users/roles) - Test authorization (non-admin should get 403) - Test password change validation - Test built-in role protection (User, Admin cannot be deleted)
## Future Enhancements
- [ ] Bulk user import/export - [ ] Advanced user filtering and search - [ ] User activity/audit logging - [ ] Role-based permission management - [ ] User deactivation (soft delete) - [ ] Email notifications on account actions - [ ] Two-factor authentication management - [ ] User lockout/unlock via admin

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
namespace PicoNet.Application.Features.Users.Commands;
public record ListUsersCommand(int PageNumber = 1, int PageSize = 10);
